title: Lilith Soul Stream Fanwankish
wikitext:
[]: Lilith Soul Stream (Fanwankish)             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue May 19, 2009 8:34 am Do all human souls in Evangelion return to Lilith? or just during third Impact? For instance When Kaji gets killed since hes a Lilim does his soul get sucked into Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue May 19, 2009 12:54 pm well lilith doesnt create the souls, so i don't think souls would return to her

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue May 19, 2009 1:03 pm Who creates the souls then, the egg?

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Tue May 19, 2009 2:11 pm The souls seem to have been released from Lilith's chamber long ago - the chamber is called "empty". The souls are not shown to do anything upon death of the body, except at instrumentality. In Jewish mystical thought, the souls of the pre-carnate reside in the chamber until incarnating. There is a finite number, and the chamber will eventually empty. So NGE's emptying of the chamber at a past point of all souls, before they incarnate, is a departure. At instrumentality there's a lot of soul busy-ness - at least from those Tanged. It's richly debated whether past-dead souls are acted upon by Instrumentality, so Kaji's soul's fate is not clearly known. It is also debated what "creates" the souls, though most seem to see Lilith's chamber as a storage/transportation mechanism rather than a soul generator.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue May 19, 2009 3:32 pm The OP + fanwanking proposes the idea that souls are summoned from a higher dimension.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun May 24, 2009 3:04 pm It all comes down to what you believe... Do you think that a new soul is created every time two people come together and make a child, or do you think there is a pre-existing well of souls somewhere that all souls are delivered from, or even a finite amount of souls? Strange ponderings, indeed... Personally though, my own belief is that a new human soul is a product of reproduction, so that has typically been the lens I view Evangelion through, even if I wasn't intentionally doing it.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Tue May 26, 2009 1:10 pm ^In terms of NGE, we seem to be told that there is a Chamber of Guff, the Judaic storage place of all pre-made souls.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 27, 2009 2:19 pm Timstuff wrote: It all comes down to what you believe...
